---
name: 🧮 Mathematical Parser Inaccuracy
about: Report a failure in tokenization, float rounding, or evaluation logic.
title: "[MATH-ERROR] "
labels: ["bug", "math-core"]
---

## 🧮 Broken Equation String
Provide the exact string pattern typed into the input field:
`e.g., 0.1 + 0.2` or `(5 * 3) mod 2`

## 📉 Erroneous Output Rendered
What did the screen layout output?
`e.g., 0.30000000000000004`

## 📈 Expected Mathematical Truth
What is the mathematically precise answer?
`e.g., 0.3`

## 🔬 Computational Node Analysis
Did this error occur during primary arithmetic (Grades I-III) or secondary scientific calculations (Grades IV-XII)?
